name: Tenecia Luster
ai_summary: Tenecia Luster has extensive childcare experience, having run her own daycare and cared for family members, supplemented by early childhood development coursework. Her flexible availability and nurturing, milestone-focused approach make her well-suited for both full-time and part-time teaching roles.
